data.content: Plan: Increase global typography scale by 1 unit using root font-size in src/app/globals.css (set html font-size to calc(100% + 1px)) so Tailwind rem-based text classes scale uniformly. Verify with lint, typecheck, tests, and build in dedicated worktree. Risk: any hardcoded px font sizes will not scale with root rem; acceptable for this request unless regressions are found. Decomposition: no child knots needed because scope is a single-file style adjustment.
